description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish library that triggers on push events with any tag. The workflow has two jobs: test and publish. The test job runs on ubuntu-latest with a matrix of Python versions 2.7, 3.6-3.10, checking out the code, setting up Python, installing dependencies, and testing with tox. The publish job depends on test, runs on ubuntu-latest, checks out the code, sets up Python 3.9, builds artifacts, and publishes a Python distribution to PyPI using a token from secrets.
